html:
Exclusive to:

The Circuit Extractor is an item that can only be crafted and used by WX-78, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. The Circuit Extractor can be used to remove Circuits from WX-78's circuit bars. Using the Circuit Extractor will take off circuits starting from the top and remove the respective amount of charge that was used to power the circuit.

WX-78 with the Right To Modify skill can remove any circuits in the circuit bars. If there are more than one of the same circuits is bar, only the top one is able to be extracted. Also, circuits lose 12.5% durability, instead of 25%, when extracted.

If WX-78 with the Shadow Servitor skill has shadow components implanted, they can use Circuit Extractor to remove it.

Circuit Extractor
"Success comes from those who really a-ply themselves."
Object Info
Perk
Allows WX-78 to remove circuits from their body.
Can be Burned
Does not stack
Crafting
×2 ×2
Filters
Miscellaneous
"wx78_moduleremover"
Exclusive to:
“Obviously a delicate and complicated scientific instrument.”
–Wilson
“let me try... hold still, WX!”
–Willow
“Is funny robot thing.”
–Wolfgang
“What must it be like, to lose a piece of oneself and feel nothing?”
–Wendy
“COMMENCE UPGRADES”
–WX-78
“Do be careful with that, dear.”
–Wickerbottom
“Guess that's one way to do it.”
–Woodie
“Nerves of steel, that one.”
–Maxwell
“I trust my ally knöws what they are döing.”
–Wigfrid
“We're not sure if that's safe...”
–Webber
“Ah, I believe this utensil belongs to our metal friend.”
–Warly
“Robot friend fixer”
–Wormwood
“Sheesh, they could just ask for my help!”
–Winona
“It'll work in a pinch, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Haha! Ironfolk weird.”
–Wurt
“Should I start carrying something like this in my first aid kit?”
–Walter
“Did the automaton make off with one of my tools?”
–Wanda
The Circuit Extractor is an item that can only be crafted and used by WX-78, exclusive to Don't Starve Together. The Circuit Extractor can be used to remove Circuits from WX-78's circuit bars. Using the Circuit Extractor will take off circuits starting from the top and remove the respective amount of charge that was used to power the circuit.
WX-78 with the Right To Modify skill can remove any circuits in the circuit bars. If there are more than one of the same circuits is bar, only the top one is able to be extracted. Also, circuits lose 12.5% durability, instead of 25%, when extracted.
If WX-78 with the Shadow Servitor skill has shadow components implanted, they can use Circuit Extractor to remove it.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Circuit Extractor là một vật phẩm chỉ có thể chế tạo và sử dụng bởi WX-78, độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together. Bộ trích xuất mạch có thể được sử dụng để loại bỏ Mạch khỏi các thanh mạch của WX-78. Việc sử dụng Bộ tách mạch sẽ loại bỏ các mạch bắt đầu từ trên xuống và loại bỏ lượng điện tích tương ứng được sử dụng để cấp nguồn cho mạch.

Ironfolk weird. |walter = Should I start carrying something like this in my first aid kit? |wanda = Did the automaton make off with one of my tools? |choose = wx78}} The '''Circuit Extractor''' is an item that can only be crafted and used by [[WX-78]], exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. Using the Circuit Extractor will take off circuits starting from the top and remove the respective amount of charge that was used to power the circuit. WX-78 with the [[Right To Modify]] skill can remove any circuits in the circuit bars. If there are more than one of the same circuits is bar, only the top one is able to be extracted. Also, circuits lose 12.5% durability, instead of 25%, when extracted.
